name: fill-gaps-v1-m3-stripe-parity-corrections
description: Resolve known Stripe behavior mismatches against Pay parity expectations.

userStories.title: Align paused subscription active-state semantics
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want paused subscriptions to follow parity semantics so entitlement and reporting logic match expectations.
acceptanceCriteria: Update Stripe subscription state derivation so paused state behavior matches documented parity decision
Add tests for paused lifecycle transitions including resume and cancellation interactions
Update parity docs to explicitly describe paused active-state semantics
userStories.notes: Updated paused active-state semantics in stripe state derivation, added paused lifecycle and cancellation interaction tests, and documented parity behavior. Verified with: bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "paused" (2 pass, 0 fail).

userStories.title: Add default pause behavior in subscription pause API
userStories.description: As an integrator, I want pause operations to have sensible defaults so behavior matches Pay-style ergonomics.
acceptanceCriteria: Pause API accepts omitted behavior and applies documented default
Explicit behavior options continue working without regression
Add tests validating outgoing Stripe payload for default and explicit behavior paths
userStories.notes: Made pause behavior optional with default "void", preserved explicit behavior handling, added payload tests for default and explicit paths, and documented the default. Verified with: bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "pause" (4 pass, 0 fail).

userStories.title: Add configurable webhook live-test gating
userStories.description: As an operator, I want configurable test-event acceptance so production webhook endpoints enforce expected event mode policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Express webhook adapter supports policy flags for accepting or rejecting Stripe test events
Default policy is backward-compatible and clearly documented
Rejected events emit observable logs and return documented HTTP responses
userStories.notes: Added configurable event mode policy flags to express webhook adapter with backward-compatible defaults (allow live+test), documented behavior, and implemented rejection logging plus 400 responses for disallowed modes. Verified with: bun test src/packages/express/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "test events" (2 pass, 0 fail).

userStories.title: Correct charge tax mapping
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want charge tax fields mapped correctly so revenue and tax projections stay accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Fix charge normalization mapping for total tax amount fields based on Stripe payload data
Add tests for no-tax, single-tax, and multiple-tax scenarios
Update docs and examples where tax field semantics are referenced
userStories.notes: Corrected charge tax mapping to Stripe payment_intent amount_details tax fields (including line-item totals), added no-tax/single-tax/multiple-tax test coverage, and updated tax semantics docs/examples. Verified with: bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "tax" (3 pass, 0 fail).
